low_risk.name: Low Risk
low_risk.subtitle: Conservative Long-Only
low_risk.description: Zero-stop strategies (no trade ever dipped past 3%) — Long positions only with 3% stop-loss protection.

medium_risk.name: Medium Risk
medium_risk.subtitle: Balanced Long-Only
medium_risk.description: Minimum drawdown portfolio — Long positions only, optimized for lowest average equity drawdown, with 3% stop-loss.

high_risk.name: High Risk
high_risk.subtitle: Aggressive Long & Short
high_risk.description: Minimum drawdown portfolio — Both Long and Short positions with bidirectional override (opposite signals close existing trades). 3% stop-loss per trade.
